metadata.description: AI-driven application testing skills: flow discovery, browser-based E2E testing with a live dashboard, and local-source security auditing.

plugins.name: flow-tester
plugins.description: Understands a web app's user flows, then drives a real Chromium browser through them while a live local dashboard streams what it sees. Flags functional, content, visual, and console/network bugs. On local codebases it also runs a read-only security audit. Identify-only: it never fixes.
